task_completion.description: Navigate to the allergies section of the patient's chart.

The allergy input form shows 'Ibuprofen' as the allergen/drug, 'Skin rash and hives' as the reaction, and 'Moderate' as the severity.
The allergy to Ibuprofen with the specified reaction and severity is visible in the patient's saved allergies list or active chart, indicating the record was successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the NOSH ChartingSystem.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show progressive navigation through the NOSH UI (login, patient search, chart, allergy form) rather than just a final state or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to insert the record.
